name: QRadar Audit: Payload Deleted or Modified
notes: This rule creates an offense when a command might modify log files.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of SIM Audit
when the event QID is one of the following (28250184) A user executed a command from the command prompt
when the event matches Command (custom) matches any of expressions [(vi|rm|mv|cp).*payload_(events|flows)~\d+_\d~\S{16}~\S{16}~\d.* or echo.*>.*payload_(events|flows)~\d+_\d~\S{16}~\S{16}~\d.*]
TD_list: APPLY QRadar Audit: Payload Deleted or Modified on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of SIM Audit
AND when the event QID is one of the following (28250184) A user executed a command from the command prompt
AND when the event matches Command (custom) matches any of expressions [(vi|rm|mv|cp).*payload_(events|flows)~\d+_\d~\S{16}~\S{16}~\d.* or echo.*>.*payload_(events|flows)~\d+_\d~\S{16}~\S{16}~\d.*]
RED_list: Event name: Payload Deleted or Modified
Event description: Detects when payload is deleted or modified.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
This event / flow will be propagated to the 'System Notifications' item in the dashboard
